summary: Venue Acquisition workflow fully tested within /team/* portal structure. All features verified: Specialist login/dashboard/venue form 7-step wizard working, VAM login/dashboard/review page working. Both roles have correct sidebar navigation. No critical issues found.

specialist_login.detail: Login at /team/login with specialist@venuloq.in/spec123 redirects to /team/dashboard

specialist_welcome_dashboard.detail: Welcome dashboard shows role label, quick stats (Drafts, In Review, Approved, Changes Req), announcements, quick actions (My Venues, Add New Venue), recent activity

specialist_navigation_to_dashboard.detail: Quick action 'My Venues' and sidebar link both navigate to /team/specialist/dashboard

specialist_dashboard_loads.detail: SpecialistDashboard shows venue list with 7 venues (including test data 'Playwright Test Venue'), filter chips (All, Drafts, In Review, Approved, Changes), stats bar

specialist_venue_form_step1.detail: Step 1 (Basic Info): Venue Name input, Venue Type chips (Banquet Hall, Farmhouse, Hotel, etc.), Description textarea, Continue button - all working

specialist_venue_form_step2.detail: Step 2 (Location): Address, City, Google Maps Link inputs - all working with auto-save ('Draft saved' toast)

specialist_venue_form_step3.detail: Step 3 (Capacity & Price): Min/Max Guests, Per Person Price, Minimum Spend inputs - all working

specialist_venue_form_step4.detail: Step 4 (Amenities & Vibes): 17 amenity chips, 12 vibe chips - selection working with 'Saved' toast

specialist_venue_form_step5.detail: Step 5 (Photos & Videos): Photo dropzone, Add Photos button, Video dropzone, Add Videos button - all present

specialist_venue_form_step6.detail: Step 6 (Owner Contact): Owner Name, Phone, Email inputs - all working

specialist_venue_form_step7.detail: Step 7 (Review & Submit): Shows all entered data in review sections, 'Submit for Review' button present

vam_login.detail: Login at /team/login with vam@venuloq.in/vam123 redirects to /team/dashboard

vam_welcome_dashboard.detail: Welcome dashboard shows 'Acquisition Manager' role, stats (Pending Review, Approved, Changes Sent), quick action 'Review Queue'

vam_dashboard_loads.detail: VAMDashboard shows stat cards (Pending Review: 0, Approved: 1, Changes Sent: 0, Rejected: 1), venue list filtered by selected stat

vam_venue_review_page.detail: Clicking venue card navigates to /team/vam/venue/:id - shows status badge, photos, videos, venue details sections

vam_review_actions_visibility.detail: Review actions (Approve, Request Changes, Reject, Notes) correctly hidden for non-submitted venues (approved/rejected)

specialist_sidebar.detail: Sidebar shows Home, My Venues, Back to Website links - all working

vam_sidebar.detail: Sidebar shows Home, Review Queue, Back to Website links - confirmed in DashboardLayout code

seed_data_creation: Test created 'TEST_PlaywrightVenue_1773982935' during testing (draft status, not submitted). Existing test venues: 'Playwright Test Venue', 'TEST_VenueOnboard_1773979303' (approved), 'TEST_Reject_1773979310' (rejected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Acquisition workflow working in /team/* portal structure. Key routes: /team/login, /team/dashboard (welcome), /team/specialist/dashboard, /team/specialist/venue/:id or /new, /team/vam/dashboard, /team/vam/venue/:id. Key data-testid attributes: add-venue-btn, venue-card-{id}, filter-{status}, step-basic/location/capacity/features/media/contact/review, venue-name, venue-description, venue-address, venue-city, venue-cap-min, venue-cap-max, next-step-btn, submit-venue-btn, vam-stats, vam-stat-{status}, vam-venue-{id}, vam-review-actions, vam-approve-btn, vam-changes-btn, vam-reject-btn, vam-review-notes, vam-back-btn. Form has 7 steps with auto-save on Continue. VAM review actions only show for 'submitted' status venues.
